narrative:
Lakeview Local Sd (Trumbull) school district has 9,216 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
